article_title: B.C. Reg. 240/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: BC updates property value rates for electrical power lines, effective 2026
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has updated the dollar-per-kilometre rates used to calculate the assessed value (the official estimated value used for property tax purposes) of electrical power lines in BC, with the new rates applying for the 2026 tax year.
briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 240/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
